mapper.select:
SELECT maHanhKhach, hoTen, cmnd, soDienThoai FROM HanhKhach where 1=1
AND (hoTen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR soDienThoai LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY maHanhKhach DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM HanhKhach where 1=1
AND (hoTen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR soDienThoai LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HanhKhach (hoTen, cmnd, soDienThoai) VALUES (#{hoTen}, #{cmnd}, #{soDienThoai})
